home.welcomeSubtitle: سجل الدخول لرؤية فيديوهات الأشخاص الذين تتابعهم
home.title: الرئيسية
home.subtitle: فيديوهات الأشخاص الذين تتابعهم

discovery.title: اكتشف
discovery.subtitle: استكشف الفيديوهات من الشبكة
discovery.verifiedOnlyHint: يتم عرض الفيديوهات التي تحتوي على تحقق ProofMode فقط

messages.title: الرسائل المباشرة
messages.subtitle: تحدث مع الدعم، وأرسل vines بشكل خاص، أو واصل المحادثة مع الأشخاص الذين تتابعهم.
messages.signerUnsupported: يمكن للموقّع الحالي تسجيل دخولك، لكنه لا يوفّر بعد تشفير NIP-44. انتقل إلى nsec أو bunker أو موقّع آخر يدعم NIP-44 لاستخدام الرسائل المباشرة على الويب.
messages.supportSummary: اسأل عن الأخطاء أو الإشراف أو مشكلات الحساب.

support.title: الدعم
support.subtitle: هل تحتاج إلى مساعدة؟ نحن هنا لمساعدتك.
support.helpCenterDescription: اعثر على إجابات لأسئلتك حول Divine.
support.messageSupportDescription: تواصل مباشرة مع صندوق دعم Divine باستخدام رسائل NIP-17 الخاصة.
support.contactDescription: أنشئ تذكرة وسنرد عليك في أقرب وقت ممكن.
support.githubDescription: أبلغ عن الأخطاء أو اطلب ميزات أو تصفح المشكلات الحالية في مستودعات GitHub الخاصة بنا.
support.communityDescription: انضم إلى نقاشات المجتمع وتواصل مع مستخدمي Divine الآخرين على Nostr.
support.communityBody: تم بناء Divine على Nostr، وهو بروتوكول اجتماعي لامركزي. اعثر علينا في عميل Nostr المفضل لديك.

categoriesPage.title: الفئات
categoriesPage.subtitle: تصفح الفيديوهات حسب الموضوع
categoriesPage.metaDescription: استكشف فئات الفيديو على Divine مثل الكوميديا والموسيقى والرقص والحيوانات والرياضة والطعام والمزيد.

vineBadge.tooltip: Original Vine archive preserved from the Internet Archive

muteFailed.title: Mute didn't land.
muteFailed.description: Couldn't save the mute. Try again?

pinFailed.title: Pin snagged.
pinFailed.descriptionFallback: Couldn't update the pin. Try again?

noDownloadUrl.title: Nothing to download.
noDownloadUrl.description: This video doesn't have a URL yet.

addToListDialog.title: Add to List
addToListDialog.description: Add this video to your lists or create a new one
addToListDialog.loginRequiredDescription: Please log in to add videos to lists
addToListDialog.notOnPublicLists: Not on any public lists yet
addToListDialog.emptyState: No lists yet. Make one and start stashing.
addToListDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: A collection of my favorite videos...
addToListDialog.toastAddFailedDescription: Couldn't save to your lists. Try again?
addToListDialog.toastCreateFailedDescription: List creation hit a snag. Try again?

createListDialog.title: Create New List
createListDialog.description: Create a collection of your favorite videos to share with others
createListDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: A collection of hilarious and creative videos...
createListDialog.playOrderHelp: How videos should be ordered when viewing the list
createListDialog.collaborativeHelp: Allow others to add videos to this list
createListDialog.toastNameRequiredDescription: Lists need a name to exist.
createListDialog.toastLoginRequiredDescription: Sign in to start a list.
createListDialog.toastCreateFailedDescription: List creation hit a snag. Try again?

editListDialog.title: Edit List
editListDialog.description: Update your list's details and settings
editListDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: A collection of hilarious and creative videos...
editListDialog.playOrderHelp: How videos should be ordered when viewing the list
editListDialog.collaborativeHelp: Allow others to add videos to this list
editListDialog.toastNameRequiredDescription: Lists need a name to exist.
editListDialog.toastSaveFailedDescription: List update hit a snag. Try again?

zapDialog.sendAZapDescription: Zaps are small Bitcoin payments that support the creator of this item. If you enjoyed this, consider sending a zap!
zapDialog.scanOrCopyHelp: Scan the QR code or copy the invoice to pay with any Lightning wallet.

walletModal.lightningWalletDescription: Connect your lightning wallet to send zaps instantly.
walletModal.noWalletsYet: No wallets yet. Plug one in to start zapping.
walletModal.installHelp: Install a WebLN extension or connect a NWC wallet for zaps.
walletModal.connectNwcWalletDescription: Enter your connection string from a compatible wallet.
walletModal.connectionUriRequiredDescription: Please enter a valid NWC connection URI.
walletModal.activeWalletChangedDescription: The selected wallet is now active for zaps.

profileHeader.classicVineStatsCaption: Stats from the original Vine platform (2013-2017)

loginDialog.title: Sign in to Divine
loginDialog.heading: Get in.
loginDialog.subtitleRegister: Got an invite? Spin up an account.
loginDialog.subtitleSignIn: Sign in at login.divine.video with your existing account.
loginDialog.inviteUnavailable: Invite sign-up is unavailable right now. You can still sign in on the next tab.
loginDialog.extensionHelper: Use your browser extension if you already have a signer set up.
loginDialog.errorExtensionNotFound: Nostr extension not found. Please install a NIP-07 extension.
loginDialog.errorKeyLoginFailed: Failed to login with this key. Please check that it is correct.
loginDialog.errorNsecRequired: Drop your secret key to continue.
loginDialog.errorNsecInvalid: Invalid secret key format. Must be a valid nsec starting with nsec1.
loginDialog.errorBunkerRequired: Drop a bunker URI to continue.
loginDialog.errorBunkerInvalid: Invalid bunker URI format. Must start with bunker://
loginDialog.errorBunkerConnectFailed: Failed to connect to bunker. Please check the URI.
loginDialog.errorFileNoValidKey: File does not contain a valid secret key.

reportContentDialog.description: Help us understand what's wrong with this {{contentType}}
reportContentDialog.loggedOutMessage: You need to be logged in to report content. This helps us verify reports and follow up with you if needed.
reportContentDialog.publicNoticeBody: Reports are published as NIP-56 events on the Nostr network and will be linked to your username. Do not include sensitive or private information in reports.
reportContentDialog.supportPrefix: If you have a sensitive issue to share privately, please use our
reportContentDialog.toastSentDescription: Thanks for watching the community's back.

deleteVideoDialog.title: Delete Video?
deleteVideoDialog.description: This action will send a deletion request to all relays. Most relays will honor this request and remove your video.
deleteVideoDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you deleting this video?
deleteVideoDialog.reasonHelp: This reason will be included in the deletion event sent to relays.
deleteVideoDialog.noteBody: While most relays will remove your video, deletion is not guaranteed. Some relays may choose to keep the content, and users who have already downloaded it will still have access.

viewSourceDialog.title: Video Event Source
viewSourceDialog.noteFetchError: Could not fetch full event from relay. This is a reconstructed representation from cached data.
viewSourceDialog.noteReconstructed: This is a reconstructed representation from parsed data. The original event signature and some tags may not be included.
viewSourceDialog.verifiedBody: This is the complete original event with cryptographic signature.

ageVerificationOverlay.restrictedBody: This content may not be appropriate for all audiences.
ageVerificationOverlay.rememberNote: Your choice will be remembered for 30 days
ageVerificationOverlay.signInHeading: Sign in to view this content
ageVerificationOverlay.signInBody: This content is age-restricted. Sign in so we can confirm your age and load the video.
